name: Gelato Print-on-Demand Global Network API
what_it_does: Gelato print-on-demand global network REST API for e-commerce businesses, creators, and brands to automate custom product printing and local fulfillment across 32 countries through Gelato's network of 130+ print partners — enabling apparel, wall art, mugs, cards, books, and packaging printed locally near the customer for faster delivery and lower carbon footprint. Enables AI agents to manage product catalog for available POD item automation, handle order creation for global fulfillment automation, access shipping option for delivery selection automation, retrieve order status for production tracking automation, manage template for design file automation, handle product variant for size and color automation, access pricing for cost calculation automation, retrieve webhook for fulfillment event automation, manage store integration for e-commerce platform connection automation, and integrate Gelato with Shopify, WooCommerce, Etsy, Squarespace, and headless platforms for end-to-end global POD automation.
use_cases: Fulfilling custom apparel and wall art orders locally near customers for global e-commerce automation agents
Automating print-on-demand product creation and order routing for creator merchandise platform agents
Integrating Gelato with Shopify or WooCommerce for automated product listing and order fulfillment agents
Calculating landed cost (product + local shipping) for global pricing optimization automation agents
not_for: Bulk offset printing contracts (Gelato is print-on-demand unit fulfillment only)
Digital product or software delivery (Gelato is physical printed product fulfillment)
Custom industrial packaging at scale (Gelato is consumer-grade custom product printing)
best_when: A global e-commerce store, creator platform, or brand wanting AI agents to automate local print-on-demand fulfillment across 32 countries through Gelato's 130+ partner print network for faster delivery and sustainability.
avoid_when: LOCAL PARTNER SELECTION IS AUTOMATIC: Gelato automatically routes orders to nearest qualified print partner; automated specific lab selection assumption creates inability to control print partner; automated must accept Gelato's routing and work with their quality guarantees. IMAGE REQUIREMENTS ARE PRODUCT-SPECIFIC: Each Gelato product type has specific artwork requirements (bleed, safe zone, resolution, color mode); automated generic image upload without product-specific specs creates rejected or poor-quality print; automated must validate against product-specific artwork guidelines. ORDER CANCELLATION WINDOW IS SHORT: Gelato orders enter production quickly; automated cancellation window varies (minutes to hours); automated must implement cancellation logic immediately on customer request. STORE CONNECTION IS SEPARATE FROM API: Gelato's Shopify/WooCommerce store connections work differently from direct API; automated assumption they're the same creates integration confusion; automated should use appropriate integration path for their deployment (API vs. store plugin).

auth.notes: Gelato uses API key (X-API-KEY header) for authentication. REST API with JSON. Oslo, Norway HQ. Founded 2007 by Henrik Müller-Hansen. Backed by Softbank ($240M Series C 2021, $1B valuation). Products: Apparel, wall art, mugs, greeting cards, books, packaging, photo products. SDKs: None public. 32 countries, 130+ print partners, 10M+ products shipped. Ships to 200+ countries. Focuses on local production/local delivery model for sustainability. GDPR. Competes with Printful and Printify for global POD.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free account with sandbox testing; production charges per order
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-product cost varies by item and production location; no monthly fee for basic; Gelato+ subscription ($14.99/month) for premium features
pricing.notes: Oslo NO. SoftBank backed. Per-product + shipping. Free tier available. GDPR.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; order APIs throttled; webhooks for order and shipment events

known_agent_gotchas: PRODUCT-SPECIFIC ARTWORK REQUIREMENTS: Gelato products have unique artwork specs per product type (bleed areas, safe zones, color mode CMYK vs RGB, minimum resolution); automated generic image submission creates rejected or poor-quality print; automated must fetch and validate against product-specific artwork guide before order

AUTOMATIC LOCAL ROUTING: Gelato routes to nearest print partner automatically; automated specific print location control creates routing override not supported; automated must accept Gelato's partner selection based on customer shipping destination

ORDER CANCELLATION IS TIME-SENSITIVE: Gelato orders begin production within minutes of submission; automated cancellation assumption creates inability to cancel in-production orders; automated cancellation logic must be immediate on customer request

PRODUCT UID REQUIRED FOR ORDERING: Gelato uses specific product UIDs (not names) for order items; automated product name lookup creates product_not_found; automated must look up correct product UID from catalog API before order submission

SHIPMENT TRACKING IS ASYNC VIA WEBHOOK: Gelato shipment tracking numbers are provided via webhook events, not synchronously; automated polling for tracking number creates unnecessary API calls; automated must implement webhook handler for shipment_created events
agent_readiness.security_notes: Global print-on-demand. GDPR, PCI-DSS. API key. EU/NO. Order and customer shipping data.

security_score_components.security_notes: POD fulfillment. GDPR, PCI-DSS. API key. EU/Global. Order and customer data.
